2026-06-02TCCanada Marine ActAppointment of a director of the Prince Rupert Port AuthorityAppointment of Matthew Grant of Calgary, Alberta, to be a director of the Prince Rupert Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years.N/A
subject: Appointment of a director of the Prince Rupert Port Authority
precis: Appointment of Matthew Grant of Calgary, Alberta, to be a director of the Prince Rupert Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years.
